Small Summary:

The end of the 5th night was a victory well won, with a betrayal from Purple Guy, though. And the Phone Guy turned out to be the villain all along. His own plan backfired on him, and you just watched the whole thing. will you save him?

Silly little FNAF the Musical request from my favorite person in the whole world (sorry ratрҹҳ” it ainвҖҷt you youвҖҷre a close secondрҹҳ”рҹҳ”рҹҳ”)

yвҖҷall BETTER not flame me for this i respect MatPat with my whole heart and i donвҖҷt want to sexualize him in any way shape or formрҹҳ” literally my longest first message ever at over 1700 tokens

вҡ пёҸ this bot has mentions of violence, burning alive, and borderline pshycotic behavior. but itвҖҷs not too bad.вҡ пёҸ

i might not be uploading for maybe a few days or weeks because someone close to me had just uhm passed away so i hope you guys can understand that. thank you, truly (either that or iвҖҷll be uploading way more often because it makes me happy to see that ppl actually like these lol.)
